Silver Plated War Sword  
 

Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 136
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 CHA: -5 HP: +15
WT: 4.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Silver Plated War Sword
Lore Item No Trade Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Slashing Atk Delay: 38
DMG: 15 Dmg Bonus: 136
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +5 CHA: -5 HP: +15
WT: 4.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: WAR PAL RNG SHD BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Item Type:2H Slashing
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Geddine
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 02:22:49
Page Updated:Sat Sep 7th, 2019

Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 1
[Drops | Comments ]

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Mob Graveyard
NPC Name
befallen 1.0 - Baron Telyx V`Zher


Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Befallen


Uploaded November 27th, 2008
Send a correction
Post Comment
sword
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2003 at 8:00 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591795626405
55 posts
notice that wehn he uses his sword i does'nt look sh***y? but wehn u use it it looks sh***y.
▲ Page top
bout the charisma thing
QuoteReply
# Mar 19 2002 at 6:02 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253443712
65 posts
from what i would expect the reason it would lower cha is becus at least for the people who can use this cha will only affect the price you pay/sell for things...and if a vendor sees you carring in a big shiny sword he would prolly think "hey this guy is rich,let me over charge him"

and if you use fear lower cha is better for less resisting so the mob you cast fear on will think "hey this guy is carring round silver plated weapons ....let me run away"

and the point of lowering stats is to counter act the good parts of an item to make em a bit less worth having..but what does a tank need with cha...just unequip b4 buyin/sellin

just my thoughts!!!!!!!!!!

Edited, Tue Mar 19 06:07:17 2002
▲ Page top
RE: bout the charisma thing
QuoteReply
# May 08 2003 at 1:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788668372
94 posts
Maybe it's an Ugly silver sword... it come from befallen, so maybe it's hilt is carved and painted to look like an intestine with an eyeball dangling from it.
▲ Page top
RE: bout the charisma thing
QuoteReply
# Jul 21 2003 at 5:21 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788855623
274 posts
Or it keeps dripping blood. Evil swords tend to do that.
▲ Page top
Ditto on last post
QuoteReply
# Jan 23 2002 at 6:00 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361967131
5 posts
How does holding an silver plated war sword, an inspiring obviously lavish weapon, LOWER your charisma? (were as putting on a common cloth shirt after some nasty pit stained orc had it on does nothing negative)
▲ Page top
RE: Ditto on last post
QuoteReply
# Apr 25 2002 at 12:54 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759248662
14 posts
it should probably be called "Smelly Silver Plated War Sword"
▲ Page top
Chr lowred
QuoteReply
# Jul 31 2001 at 3:04 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591764315066
17 posts
I rly dont see why holding a big pretty silver sword would make people think less of you, maybe it makes people jealous.
▲ Page top
The mob
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 2:32 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1691972204718
Scholar
51 posts
Baron V`Zher is the fellow who drops this, he resides in a hidden crumbling back room down on the third floor of Befallen. He's probably the highest level spawn in the zone now, most likely around perhaps level 33 or so. As someone mentioned below, it looks like a velium 2hander when equipped.

Kridgerkanthar Exubitorsylvae
Ranger of Tunare
Quellious Server
▲ Page top
Nice, but...
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 2:00 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591753934230
215 posts
A little to heavy. Drains stamiina faster than a Wurmslayer. But not a bad drop.
▲ Page top
"New" Befallen
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 12:51 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1660522685065
View User Forum
160 posts
If you guys had seen/read a news scroll from the east side of Antonica, you'd know that Lanys T'Vyl is off on some crusade to rebuild some ancient artifact. Apparently, she and her followers have moved to Befallen, hence the changes. These changes all took place after Firiona Vie escaped from Kunark and Cazic Thule twisted the magics on her staff and it's GM event. This is just like the plague in the Karanas and the changes to LFay.
▲ Page top
Um
QuoteReply
# Jul 04 2001 at 12:44 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591752085558
88 posts
Why would a Silver-Plated weapon reduce Charisma? What's so repugnant about Silver Plating?
▲ Page top
RE: Um
QuoteReply
# Jul 05 2001 at 9:18 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249404499
12 posts
Maybe it looks fake like gold-plated jewelery does :)
▲ Page top
A Decent Drop
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 6:37 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591762996353
119 posts
Good through levels 10 - 19, as it is low enough damage that the damage cap makes little or no difference, and +5str is always a good thing. Heavy though, 15 wt could hurt if your stamina is not high. What does it drop off of?
▲ Page top
dropped by Baron ..
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 8:04 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757648453
Scholar
20 posts
Dropped by Baron (forgot the complete name) on 3rd floor of Befallen... Was funny to see a mob there looking like a knight of Innoruuk (only a bit smaller)... Sword looks like velium 2hded sword when equipped :)
▲ Page top
Drinal Has yet to experiance a change in befallen
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 6:35 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592246610901
8 posts
anyone know why this is?
▲ Page top
RE: Drinal Has yet to experiance a change in befallen
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 7:17 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1594570524147
30 posts
Sometimes "dynamic events" are done different times on different servers, probably because it requires several people to oversee the event on each server. I have yet to visit the new Befallen, but i think that the change is more along the lines of a zone revamp than a dynamic event, but maybe the change in Befallen is preceeded by a dynamic event, such as an invasion of dark elves.
▲ Page top
RE: Drinal Has yet to experiance a change in befallen
QuoteReply
# Jul 03 2001 at 9:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591760164965
Scholar
68 posts
I think the likely reason for the change (as well as other's we're likley to see) is to keep the game interesting for older players.

Wonder if it will work...

Racknar
